briefs.title: BC Ferries Designation Schedule Updated Under Coastal Ferry Act — Route or Service Changes Possible
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 11/2026 amends Schedule A of the Designation Regulation (B.C. Reg. 109/2003) under the Coastal Ferry Act, updating designated ferry routes or services. Full details are available at BC Ferries Head Office or online under their Governance resources.
briefs.action_required: Review updated Schedule A at bcferries.com under Governance > Coastal Ferry Act if your business depends on designated ferry routes.
